answer: The top 311 complaint type in Austin last month was "DSD - Request Code Officer" with 2,255 reports. This was followed by "ARR - Garbage" with 2,130 reports and "TPW - Parking Violation Enforcement" with 2,126 reports. Other common complaints included "ARR - Compost" (1,417 reports) and "TPW - Traffic Signal - Maintenance" (1,217 reports).
